channel.title: scale on Mohammad Aziz
channel.description: Recent content in scale on Mohammad Aziz

item.title: Small Simple Solutions Scale
item.description: What kills a developer’s productivity? Over engineering, for sure. You read tech blogs from companies which are massively bigger than you. And make technical decisions trying to understand copy their style and architecture. You are missing the point! A good presentation is like a good story to be told. A story in which they fight an obstacle. Most people think that the same obstacle is going to bite them in future.
